productDisplayName: French Connection Women Taupe & Brown Handbag
description: Style NoteThis french connection piece nails all the season's bag trends perfectly - carry this to add a refined dimension to any simple outfit. A necessary indulgence, which is sure to become a love-forever classic in your collection, this bag hits all the fashion notes just right.Product DetailsTaupe and brown bag with one main compartment that has an inner zipped pocket and an organiser sleeveTwo short handles with a woven design for styleHas a shoulder strap with branding in a small pouch on the short handle that also doubles up as a mirror Material and Care80% cotton and 20% polyurethaneWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 22 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 9 cm
